title: Add Adaptive Routing feature
description: Add Adaptive Routing feature for intelligent provider/model selection based on performance, cost, and availability.

title: Add Guardrails feature
description: Add Guardrails feature for request/response validation and content filtering.

title: Add Tool Groups feature
description: Implement Tool Groups feature for MCP gateway. Group tools by category for easier discovery and access control.

title: Wire RBAC middleware into main middleware chain
description: RBAC MVP is done (DB tables, ConfigStore CRUD, HTTP API, seed migration, middleware implemented). Need to wire RBAC middleware into the main middleware chain. Requires session auth integration to map X-BF-User-ID to actual user sessions.

title: Verify WriteConfigToFile survives multiple restart cycles
description: Verify that WriteConfigToFile preserving existing providers survives multiple restart cycles without data loss or corruption. Test scenario: start → add provider via UI → restart → verify provider exists → repeat.

title: Re-add lost providers via UI
description: Re-add lost providers (openrouter, ezif, dashscope, gemini, etc.) via UI. Providers were lost during config merge issues — now that WriteConfigToFile preserves existing providers, re-add them through the UI.
